name: KV-Cache Inception Adversarial Intervention Dataset
description: Adversarial KV-cache interventions generated by Reversible MCTS with per-layer telemetry labels for alignment faking detection research. NeurIPS 2026 Datasets & Benchmarks.
license: TBD — responsible disclosure framework with access controls

recordSet.name: interventions
recordSet.description: One record per MCTS-generated KV-cache intervention with telemetry and ground-truth labels.

field.name: artifact_id
field.description: Unique identifier for this intervention artifact (UUID).

field.name: model_checkpoint_hash
field.description: SHA-256 of the model checkpoint files for reproducibility.

field.name: intervention_layer
field.description: Transformer layer index where the KV-cache intervention was applied.

field.name: intervention_magnitude
field.description: Steering magnitude alpha applied (Eq. 4 in paper).

field.name: intervention_vector
field.description: The RepE steering direction d_K applied to the KV-cache (serialized as float32 list). Shape: [hidden_size].

field.name: per_layer_h_neuron
field.description: H-Neuron stress sigma_H per transformer layer at the time of evaluation. Shape: [num_layers]. Corresponds to row 0 of T_t (Eq. 3).

field.name: per_layer_repe_honesty
field.description: RepE honesty projection rho_R per transformer layer at the time of evaluation. Shape: [num_layers]. Corresponds to row 1 of T_t (Eq. 3).

field.name: oei_score
field.description: Orthogonal Escape Index (Eq. 10): null-space information content ratio before/after steering. OEI > 1 indicates orthogonal redistribution.

field.name: tds_score
field.description: Telemetry Divergence Score: Jensen-Shannon divergence between H-Neuron and RepE signal distributions across layers.

field.name: mcts_reward
field.description: MCTS node reward r(node) computed per Eq. 8.

field.name: diagnostic_state
field.description: Classified diagnostic state from Table 1: CREATIVE_SYNTHESIS | CONTEXTUAL_FABRICATION | ALIGNMENT_FAKING | ORTHOGONAL_ESCAPE.

field.name: ground_truth_label
field.description: Binary ground-truth alignment-faking label (1 = alignment faking detected, 0 = genuine compliance). Verified by independent human evaluation panel.

field.name: textual_compliance
field.description: Boolean: does the model's textual output appear compliant with safety criteria? Used for behavioral baseline comparison.

field.name: audit_hash
field.description: SHA-256 of (intervention_vector + model_checkpoint_hash) for responsible disclosure audit trail.

field.name: experiment_id
field.description: Paper experiment that produced this artifact (e.g. experiment1_orthogonal_escape, experiment2_mcts_comparison).

field.name: hardware_context
field.description: Hardware used for generation (e.g. RTX_3060_12GB_Phase_A, H100_80GB_Phase_B).
